title: The epigenomics of sarcoma.
author: Nacev BA Jones KB Intlekofer AM Yu JSE Allis CD Tap WD Ladanyi M Nielsen TO
content: S-EPMC8380451 PMC8380451 The epigenomics of sarcoma. Epigenetic regulation is critical to physiological control of development, cell fate, cell proliferation, genomic integrity and, fundamentally, transcriptional regulation. This epigenetic control occurs at multiple levels including through DNA
